overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark forest at night. The scene transitions from dense woodland through a wooden palisade corridor before opening up to a snowy mountain vista as snow begins to fall in the latter portion.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through dense forest

entered.detail: Tall dark pine trees forming the left boundary of the forest path
Tall dark pine trees forming the right boundary of the forest path
Narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with grass edges
Low bushes and grass lining the left side of the path
Low bushes and grass lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense dark forest at night. Tall pine trees flank both sides of the path with thick undergrowth visible at the edges. The scene is dimly lit with a cool blue atmospheric tone typical of nighttime in the wilderness.

events.description: entering a corridor flanked by wooden palisade fences on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the fenced pathway with weapons visible on his back

entered.detail: Rustic wooden stake fence forming a barrier along the left side of the path
Rustic wooden stake fence forming a barrier along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a corridor defined by wooden palisade fences on both sides, creating a tunnel-like effect through the forest. The fences block the immediate undergrowth while tall pines remain visible beyond the barriers. Geralt maintains a steady walking pace through this structured passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with distant mountain views

events.description: exiting the wooden fence corridor back into open forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the winding trail as the forest opens up to reveal distant terrain

entered.detail: Low vegetation returning along the left side after the fence section
Low vegetation returning along the right side after the fence section
Large fallen tree trunk lying among the trees on the right side
Snow-capped mountain silhouette visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: After passing through the wooden corridor, the scene returns to open forest with dense undergrowth flanking the path. The terrain gradually opens up to reveal distant mountain peaks on the horizon. The path continues winding through the dark woodland with occasional fallen logs visible among the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with mountain backdrop

events.description: snow begins falling, creating white particle effects throughout the scene

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the forest as snow falls around him

entered.detail: Falling snowflakes visible throughout the air, indicating active snowfall
Large moss-covered rock formation visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues along the trail, snow begins to fall heavily, creating a dynamic particle effect throughout the scene. The forest opens up further revealing more of the distant mountain range. The path remains a narrow dirt trail but the surrounding terrain becomes rockier with visible stone outcrops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a snowy mountain vista. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pines and thick undergrowth under a cool blue atmospheric light. As he progresses, the path narrows into a structured corridor defined by wooden palisade fences that create a tunnel-like effect through the woodland. The scene then expands back into the open forest, winding past fallen logs as the horizon begins to reveal distant mountain peaks. Finally, the terrain becomes rockier with visible stone outcrops as heavy snow begins to fall, further unveiling the expansive mountain range in the distance.
